# Short Closeout Title

## Landed Work

What merged, by PR and artifact.

## Required Evidence

Commands run and whether they passed.

## Receipts

Generated artifacts, badges, reports, or release-evidence paths.

## Support-Tier Impact

What changed in support tiers, or `none`.

## Policy Impact

What changed in policy ledgers, or `none`.

## Claim Boundary

What the landed work proves and what it does not prove.

## Remaining Work

Ready, blocked, or deferred items that should carry into the next active goal.

## Known Risks

Residual risk, validation gaps, or external blockers.

## Rollback

How to revert the lane or individual PRs safely.

## Next Safe Action

What the next agent should do from repo state.
